prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业热度近年呈分化观望态势；计算机类、电子信息/通信持续高热推荐；广东省2026年物理类考生约45.6万人，较2025年增加约1.58万人（+3.6%），竞争略有加剧；北京师范大学（珠海校区）位于广东省珠海市，属于本省招生，对本省考生有天然地域偏好优势；该校在广东招生规模较大（物理类345人），本地招生占比高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次约13873名、2026年扩招约12.7%对位次的下拉作用、以及广东省物理类考生增加约3.6%对竞争的加剧作用，扩招幅度大于考生增幅，整体竞争略有缓解但位次仍有所后移；预测2026年物理类最低位次约15000名，区间14500–15500名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category is approximately 13873, which is the only complete admission data available in recent years; the university has a relatively large enrollment scale for Physics Category in Guangdong Province, with a baseline ranking of about 13873 in 2025; the provincial plan for Physics Category: 306 students in 2025, 345 students in 2026, an increase of about 12.7%, with a significant increase in enrollment quotas, theoretically easing competition slightly, but the large expansion has a downward effect on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 19th (Beijing Normal University main campus), stable at 19th in recent years, belonging to the top normal universities in China; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is neutral/mixed, mainly involving university management public opinion, with no obvious negative incidents; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (overall ranking 37th), short video exposure is at an upper-middle level, reflecting moderate application attention; historical abnormal admission signals only include the 2022 Jiangxi gap, with limited impact on Guangdong; Education A+, Psychology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Chinese History A+, Geography A+, Marxist Theory A+, Mathematics A, Statistics A, etc. The majors offered at Zhuhai Campus, such as Mathematics and Science Experimental Class, are highly correlated with advantageous disciplines like Mathematics, Geography, and Psychology.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of normal/education majors has shown a differentiated wait-and-see trend in recent years; Computer, Electronic Information/Communication continue to be highly recommended; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Guangdong Province is about 456,000, an increase of about 15,800 (+3.6%) compared to 2025, with slightly intensified competition; Beijing Normal University (Zhuhai Campus) is located in Zhuhai City, Guangdong Province, belonging to provincial enrollment, with a natural regional preference advantage for local examinees; the university has a large enrollment scale in Guangdong (345 students in Physics Category), with a high proportion of local enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of about 13873 in 2025, the downward effect of the approximately 12.7% enrollment expansion on rankings in 2026, and the intensifying effect of the approximately 3.6% increase in Physics Category examinees in Guangdong Province on competition, the expansion rate is greater than the examinee growth rate, overall competition slightly eases but rankings still move backward; it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 15000, with a range of 14500–15500.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Zhuhai Campus) (including Economics <Data Science>, Financial Technology)
- Mathematics Class (Zhuhai Campus) (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Physics, Systems Science and Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Applied Statistics, Artificial Intelligence <Innovation Experimental Class>).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Science Experimental Class (Zhuhai Campus) (including Geography, Psychology, Biological Sciences, Chemistry).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- No other Physics Category enrollment majors currently.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 14500–15500, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 Science Experimental Class, with Tier 1 Social Science Experimental Class and Mathematics Class as reach options; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<14500), focus on reaching for Mathematics Class (including AI direction); if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>15500), it is recommended to use Science Experimental Class as a safety option.
